subcodes.first_line: A praise sanctified from the mention of all mankind befitteth the sublime and most holy court of the Desired One, Who hath ordained that the completion of every existence
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از ذکر عالمیان ساحت امنع اقدس حضرت مقصودیرا سزاست که تمامیت هر
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @spiritual transformation, @suffering and imprisonment, @seven stages of creation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
full_text_parts: Praise be unto Thee, O Lord.  Forgive us our sins, have mercy upon us and enable us to return unto Thee.  Suffer us not to rely on aught else besides Thee, and vouchsafe unto us, through Thy bounty, that which Thou lovest and desirest and well beseemeth Thee.  Exalt the station of them that have truly believed, and forgive them with Thy gracious forgiveness.  Verily, Thou art the Help in Peril, the Self-Subsisting.
